pagelike-button-like: Label on the button that adds a page like.
pagelike-button-unlike: Label on the button that removes the current user's page like.
pagelike-button-login: Disabled button label shown to anonymous and temporary accounts.
pagelike-status-error: Fallback live-region error shown when a like request fails.
pagelike-error-disabled: API error when the PageLike master switch is off.
pagelike-error-writes-disabled: API error when PageLike writes are off.
pagelike-error-ranking-disabled: API error when PageLike rankings are off.
pagelike-error-disabled-page: API error when the page namespace or behavior switch disables likes.
echo-category-title-page-like: Title of the Echo notification category for likes on pages created by the user.
echo-pref-tooltip-page-like: Tooltip for the preference that controls notifications about likes on pages created by the user.
notification-header-page-like: Echo notification header. Parameters: $1 is the liking user's formatted name, $2 is that user's name for gender, $3 is the page title, and $4 is the recipient's name for gender.
notification-compact-header-page-like: Compact Echo notification header. Parameters: $1 is the liking user's formatted name, $2 is that user's name for gender, $3 is the page title, and $4 is the recipient's name for gender.
notification-subject-page-like: Email subject for a page-like notification. Parameters: $1 is the liking user's formatted name, $2 is that user's name for gender, and $3 is the recipient's name for gender.
